ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Further Status
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Continued To Sep-26-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that the Attorney appeared on July 18, 2017, that he was told to file the appropriate documents by today and that nothing has been filed. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on September 26, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration or a Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date. At the next hearing, the Court will consider suspension of the Executor and other appropriate sanctions for failure to file documents and failure to appear yet again.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Further Status
Off Calendar Jul-18-2017 Continued To Aug-29-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Timothy Chambers for Alexandria Von Recklinghausen (Executor).

The Court stated that the report is not in the form of a petition to have it approved. Mr. Chambers stated that the Private Fiduciary has estimated that the accounting will be completed by August 31st and that they are half way there. Status on filing of a Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to August 29, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 If the Petition for Final Distribution is filed by then, the status hearing will go off calendar. The Court advised Counsel that if it is not properly served and noticed, a Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration needs to be filed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-05-2017 Continued To May-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on May 8, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why a Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. Status on close of the Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
